titleStmt.title: SII 39.250: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 250. (A.R. No. 250 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, RĀJARĀJA III, 7 (1223 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to a gift of 22 kāśu to the temple for the supply of ghee measured by Veḷḷaippaṉṟi nāḻi by Dēvakaṇmigaḷ of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī(irācairāca) devaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu
meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu catudaśiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cittirai nāḷ Uyyak koṇṭā
r vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampāruṉtai Arayaṉ civetavaṉap perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkaḷaṟā
yaṉeṉ Arumoḻiteva vaḷanāṭṭu ceṟṟūr kūṟṟattu Uṭaiya tirukkoḷḷam putūruṭai
yār tirumaṭaiviḷākam ruvil vaṭakkaṭaiyavum vaṭa ruvil meṟkaṭaiya
vum caṇṭeśvarap peruvilai ṭa nattam kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟu
kuḻi Oṉṟukku nellu nāṉāḻiyā Itu vilaikoṇṭa paṭiyāl Āṭ nellu pati
ṉaiṅkalaṉe Irutūṇikkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻikkum talaimāṟu Innāyaṉār tevatāṉam tiruk
koḷḷam pūtūr brahmateyattu muñci pākkālukkukkīḻ karaiyil paḷḷakkaṇṭattu Eṉ
kāṇiyāṉa nilattu teṟkaṭaiya viṭṭa nilam muṉṟu mākkāṇikku Aṭaimutal vari pu
nelluppatiṉ mukkalāṉa tūṇi ka nel nāṟpattu mukkalaṉe tūṇiyil Inilatukkup pottakappaṭi Ēṟṟiṉa nilattu Oṭa Ippaṭi tevar kaṭamaikku Iṟukkum nellu Irupatin kalamum nikki Iṟai tiyāl nellu Irupattorum nel tū
kku veḷḷaip panṟi nāḻiyil naṟuney patinālu nāḻikku Ivan Ivvāḻ
vār śrī paṇṭārattu Upaiyamāka Oṭukkina kācu 2 10 2 Ipparicu cammati
ttu Ikkācu Irupattiraṇṭu Oṭukki koṇṭom Ivvāḻvār
kanmikaḷom .... ḷatu śrī vayiṣṇavarakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.250 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
